introSection: See Through Coaster is a Hoei Sangyo Co., Ltd. steel roller coaster located at Kamine Park in Ibaraki, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The roller coaster is built on a hillside and features an inclined helix.

fullText:
See Through Coaster is a Hoei Sangyo Co., Ltd. steel roller coaster located at Kamine Park in Ibaraki, Japan.

The roller coaster is built on a hillside and features an inclined helix.
